infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PulseRoute uses your location to plan cool, safe cycling routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PulseRoute uses your location during rides to monitor your route and suggest hydration stops.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PulseRoute uses your location to plan cool routes and monitor your ride.
